next90DaysPlan: Shortlist 8-10 DDS/DMD programs and map each against international financing options.
Start credential evaluation (ECE/WES) and collect all transcript/legalization documents.
Build a U.S.-style CV and draft a results-driven personal statement around 3 clinical case narratives.
Identify and brief 3 recommenders early with specific talking points about clinical judgment and professionalism.
Create a visa-ready document checklist (financial proof, timelines, and school sequencing).
Design a monthly execution tracker from now to CAAPID opening for the 2028 cycle.
next12To18Months: Finalize school strategy by fit, funding viability, and realistic interview probability.
Strengthen application quality through targeted U.S. exposure (observership/research/shadowing where feasible).
Prepare school-specific supplementals and interview narratives well before deadlines.
Run a dual-track strategy: DDS/DMD primary, optional master's bridge only if it solves a clear gap.
Verify licensure implications for Alaska, New Jersey, and Georgia before final school decisions.
